origin_definition_cn: 阴阳历的一种,是中国的传统历法,平年12个月,大月30天,小月29天,全年354天或355天(一年中哪一月大,哪一月小,年年不同)。由于平均每年的天数比太阳年约差11天,所以在19年里设置7个闰月,有闰月的年份全年383天或384天。又根据太阳的位置,把一个太阳年分成24个节气,便于农事。纪年用天干地支搭配,60年周而复始。这种历法相传创始于夏代,所以又称夏历。
definition_cn: 中国传统历法，以月相变化为基础
origin_definition_en: lunar calendar; traditional Chinese calendar, according to which a common year has 354 or 355 days, 12 months which may have 30 days or 29 days (the number of days in a month varies from year to year). As the average number of days in a lunar year is 11 days shorter than a solar year, seven leap months are added every 19 years, so a leap year has 383 or 384 days. According to the position of the sun, a solar year is divided into 24 seasonal points to facilitate farming. The years are designated by pairing items from the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches respectively so that 60 years form a cycle. The lunar calendar was allegedly created during the Xia Dynasty. Hence the term, xiali, or Xia calendar.

origin_definition_en: intelligence quotient; IQ. According to the equation, IQ = mental age ÷ chronological age × 100, if a child's mental age is equal to his or her chronological age, his or her IQ is 100, which means average intelligence. A person is billed ‘intelligent’ if his IQ is above 120, and ‘of low intelligence’ if his IQ stands below 80. Generally a person's IQ is presumed to be stable, e.g. two five-year-old children with different IQs of 80 and 120 will still maintain the same IQ results a few years later.

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号He(helium)。无色无臭无味,在大气中含量极少,化学性质极不活泼。可用来填充灯泡和霓虹灯管,也用来制造泡沫塑料。液态的氦常用做冷却剂。
definition_cn: 惰性气体元素，符号He，用于冷却剂
origin_definition_en: helium (He); colourless, odourless inert gaseous element found in rare amounts in the atmosphere, used to fill light bulbs and neon tubes, and to produce foam plastics. Liquid helium is oft. used as a coolant.

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号O(oxygenium)。无色无臭无味,能助燃,化学性质很活泼。氧在空气中约占1/5,是人和动植物呼吸所必需的气体,在工业上用途很广。
definition_cn: 化学元素，符号O，支持燃烧和呼吸
origin_definition_en: oxygen (O); active combustion-supporting gaseous chemical element that is colourless, tasteless and odourless, and makes up one fifth of the atmosphere; essential gas for the respiration of human beings, animals and plants, and widely used in industry;

origin_definition_cn: 氮和氢的化合物,化学式NH?。无色气体,有刺激性臭味,易溶于水。用做致冷剂,也用来做硝酸和氮肥。
definition_cn: 氮氢化合物NH?，用于制冷和化肥
origin_definition_en: ammonia; pungent, colourless gaseous compound, NH?, usu. produced by direct combination of nitrogen and hydrogen gases, used as a refrigerant and in the manufacture of nitric acid and nitrogenous fertilizer;

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号Ar(argonium)。无色无臭无味,是大气中含量最多的稀有气体,化学性质很不活泼。放电时发出蓝色的光,在电弧焊接不锈钢、镁、铝等时用作保护气体,也用来填充灯管和灯泡。
definition_cn: 惰性气体元素，符号Ar，用于焊接保护
origin_definition_en: argon (Ar); colourless, odourless, inert gaseous element and the most abundant rare gas in the earth's atmosphere, emitting blue light when discharging electricity, used as an inert gas shield in arc welding of stainless steel, magnesium, aluminium, etc., and also for use in electric light bulbs, fluorescent tubes

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号Kr(kryptonum)。无色,无臭,无味,大气中含量极少,化学性质很不活泼。能吸收X射线,用作X射线的屏蔽材料等。
definition_cn: 稀有气体元素，符号Kr，可吸收X射线
origin_definition_en: krypton (Kr); colourless, odourless, flavourless, and rather inert gaseous element that exists in tiny amount in the atmosphere and can absorb X-rays, oft. used as material for screening X-rays

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号N(nitrogenium)。无色,无臭,不能燃烧,也不能助燃,化学性质很不活泼。氮在空气中约占4/5,是植物营养的重要成分之一。用来制造氨、硝酸和氮肥,也用来填充灯泡。
definition_cn: 化学元素，符号N，无色无味气体，化学性质稳定，占空气体积约4/5。用于制造氨、硝酸、氮肥及填充灯泡。
origin_definition_en: nitrogen(N); gaseous element, colourless and odourless, non-combustible, non-combustion-supporting, chemically inert, comprising four fifths of the atmosphere, forming an important vegetable nutrient, used to manufacture ammonia, nitric acid and fertilizers, and to fill an electric bulb;
definition_en: nitrogen (N); colorless, odorless inert gas constituting about 4/5 of the atmosphere, used in making ammonia, nitric acid, fertilizers and for filling light bulbs

origin_definition_cn: 气体元素,符号Cl(chlorum)。黄绿色,有毒,有强烈的刺激性臭味,容易液化。用来漂白、杀菌或制造漂白粉、染料、颜料、农药、塑料等。
definition_cn: 化学元素，符号Cl，黄绿色有毒气体，有刺激性气味，易液化。用于漂白、消毒及制造漂白粉、染料等。
origin_definition_en: chlorine (Cl); greenish yellow, poisonous, gaseous chemical element with a disagreeable odour, apt to be liquidized, used as a bleaching agent, in disinfection, and in making bleaching powder, dyestuffs, paint, insecticides and plastics;
definition_en: chlorine (Cl); toxic greenish-yellow gas with pungent smell, easily liquefied, used for bleaching, disinfection and in making bleaching powder, dyes, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 碳和氮的化合物,化学式(CN)?。无色气体,有刺激性臭味,剧毒,燃烧时发桃红色火焰。
definition_cn: 碳氮化合物(CN)₂，无色剧毒气体，有刺激性气味，燃烧时呈桃红色火焰。
origin_definition_en: cyanogen (CN)?; dicyanogen; chemical compound of nitrogen and carbon in the form of colourless and highly poisonous gas with a pungent odour, producing peach-blow flames while burning
definition_en: cyanogen (CN)₂; colorless, highly toxic gas with pungent odor, burning with peach-colored flame

origin_definition_cn: 最简单的氢氧化合物，化学式H2O。无色、无味、无臭的液体，在标准大气压下，冰点0℃，沸点100℃，4℃时密度最大，比重为1。
definition_cn: 氢氧化合物H₂O，无色无味液体，标准大气压下冰点0℃，沸点100℃，4℃时密度最大。
origin_definition_en: water H?O; simplest hydroxide in the form of a colourless, odourless, and tasteless liquid, which, under standard atmospheric pressure, freezes at 0℃ and boils at 100℃ and has a maximum density at 4℃ and a specific gravity of 1
definition_en: water H₂O; colorless, tasteless liquid freezing at 0℃ and boiling at 100℃ under standard pressure, with maximum density at 4℃

origin_definition_en: water; general term for rivers, streams, lakes, seas, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 指附加的费用或额外的收入
利用水力资源和防止水的灾害。
definition_cn: 水资源的开发利用及水害防治。
origin_definition_en: water conservancy; prevent floods by taking advantage of hydraulic resources
definition_en: water conservancy; utilization of water resources and flood prevention

origin_definition_en: horizontal; level; parallel with the horizon

origin_definition_cn: 在生产、生活、政治、思想、文化、艺术、技术、业务等方面所达到的高度
definition_cn: 在各方面所达到的高度或标准。
origin_definition_en: standard; level; stature achieved in production, living, politics, thought, culture, art, skill, profession, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 可以吃的含水分较多的植物果实的统称,如梨、桃、苹果等。
definition_cn: 多汁可食用的植物果实统称，如苹果、梨等。
origin_definition_en: fruit; edible, succulent reproductive bodies of plants, e.g. pear, peach, apple, etc.
definition_en: fruit; edible juicy plant products like apples, pears, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 一种建筑材料,灰绿色或棕色粉末,用石灰石、黏土等加工制成。加水拌和,干燥后坚硬。有的地区叫水门汀。
definition_cn: 灰绿色或棕色粉末状建筑材料，加水硬化后用于建造。
origin_definition_en: cement; sage-green or brown powder made of a mixture of calcined limestone and clay, to be mixed with water and left to harden when dry, used as a building material; also called 水门汀shuǐméntīng in some areas
definition_en: cement; gray-green/brown powder that hardens when mixed with water, used in construction

origin_definition_cn: 腔肠动物,身体圆筒形,褐色,口周围有触手,是捕食物的工具,体内有一个空腔。附着在池沼、水沟中的水草或枯叶上。大多雌雄同体,生殖方法有二通常进行无性生殖(由身体长出芽体);夏初和秋末进行有性生殖。
definition_cn: 褐色圆筒形腔肠动物，触手捕食，多附着于水草，生殖方式包括无性和有性生殖。
origin_definition_en: hydra (Hydra); hermaphroditic coelenterate that typically has a brown hollow cylindrical body, with a mouth at one end surrounded by tentacles as food catchers, and closed at the other end and attached to water weeds or withered leaves in ponds or marshes, and that reproduces either through parthenogenesis (producing gemma from the body itself) or by sexual reproduction in early summer and late autumn
definition_en: hydra; brown cylindrical coelenterate with tentacles, reproducing both asexually and sexually

definition_cn: 控制自来水流的开关装置。
origin_definition_en: (water) tap; faucet; fixture for regulating the flow of tap water from pipes

origin_definition_cn: 表示时间长久,没有终止

origin_definition_en: flat; low, level land by the waterside; spit of land

seek; pursue; search for; hanker after; quest for; aspire after; hunt for

definition_cn: 通过金融机构转移资金。
origin_definition_en: remit; transfer money from one place to another through post office, bank, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 综合材料向上级报告,也指综合材料向群众报告
definition_cn: 汇总信息后向上级或公众报告。
origin_definition_en: report; summarize information and data to report to one's superior or the public

origin_definition_cn: 一个国家的货币兑换其他国家的货币的比例。

definition_cn: 中国历史朝代（公元前206-公元220年）。
origin_definition_en: Han Dynasty (206 B.C.-A.D. 220), established by Liu Bang;

origin_definition_cn: 元末农民起义领袖陈友谅所建的政权(公元1360—1363)。
definition_cn: 元末陈友谅建立的政权（1360-1363年）。
origin_definition_en: Han Regime (1360-1363) established by the peasant uprising led by Chen Youliang in the late Yuan Dynasty

origin_definition_cn: 汉族的语言,是中国的主要语言。现代汉语的标准语是普通话。
definition_cn: 汉族的语言，中国通用语，现代标准汉语为普通话。
origin_definition_en: Chinese; language spoken by the Han people, the major language spoken in China. The standard contemporary Chinese language is putonghua;
definition_en: Chinese language; Mandarin as the standard form

origin_definition_cn: 人或高等动物从皮肤排泄出来的液体,是皮肤散热的主要方式。
definition_cn: 皮肤排出的液体，用于调节体温。
origin_definition_en: sweat; perspiration; fluid excreted through the pores of the skin of humans or higher animal forms

origin_definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Hg(hydrargyrum)。银白色液体,内聚力强,蒸气有剧毒,化学性质不活泼,能溶解许多种金属。用来制药品、温度计、气压计等。
definition_cn: 金属元素，符号Hg（hydrargyrum）。银白色液体，内聚力强，蒸气有毒，化学性质稳定，能溶解多种金属。用于制造药品、温度计、气压计等。
origin_definition_en: hydrargyrum (Hg); mercury; heavy, highly toxic silver-white metallic element with inactive chemical properties, capable of dissolving a variety of metals, used in the making of pharmaceuticals, thermometers, and barometers;

definition_cn: 蓄水的小型水域，通常面积不大且较浅。
四周高、中间低洼的地形。
旧时指剧场正厅的前排座位区域。
origin_definition_en: front part of a theatre; stalls in a theatre

definition_cn: 古代城墙外围的防御水道。

origin_definition_en: pond; pool; body of shallow water smaller than a lake

definition_cn: 公共澡堂中的大型浴池（区别于单独浴盆）。

definition_cn: 特指温泉（现多用于地名）。
origin_definition_en: a special reference to hot spring (now mostly used in place names)

origin_definition_cn: 烹调后汁儿特别多的副食

definition_cn: 中药煎煮后的液体药剂。

origin_definition_cn: 汨罗江(Mìluó Jiāng),发源于江西,流入湖南洞庭湖。
definition_cn: 汨罗江，发源于江西，流入湖南洞庭湖。
origin_definition_en: Miluo River, originating in Jiangxi Province and flowing into Lake Dongting in Hunan Province
another name for 开封Kāifēng, major city in Henan Province

origin_definition_cn: 大汶河(Dàwèn Hé),水名,在山东。
液体或某些固体受热而变成的气体,例如水变成的水蒸气。
definition_cn: 液体或固体受热产生的气体。

origin_definition_cn: 轻质石油产品的一类,从石油中经分馏而得。易挥发,容易燃烧,用做内燃机燃料、溶剂等。

Rape is one of the major oil-bearing crops in China.

origin_definition_en: castor-oil plant (Ricinus communis); annual or perennial herb with big palm-shaped leaves, whose seeds are called castor beans, and the oil extracted from them castor oil, which is used as a laxative in medicine and a lubricant in industry;

origin_definition_cn: 古地名,在今北京城西南,曾为周朝燕国国都。
definition_cn: 古代燕国都城，今北京西南
origin_definition_en: Ji, name of an ancient place to the southwest of present-day Beijing, once the capital city of the State of Yan in the Zhou Dynasty
suddenly; unexpectedly; abruptly; all of a sudden

origin_definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,叶子披针形,花淡绿色或淡红色,果实卵形,扁平。茎叶有辣味。全草入药。
definition_cn: 一种有辣味的草本植物
origin_definition_en: knotweed (Polygonum); annual herb with lanceolar leaves, light green or red flowers, and flat oval fruits, stems and leaves having a peppery-taste, and the whole plant being useful as medicine;

origin_definition_cn: 植物的细长能缠绕的茎
origin_definition_en: tendril; slender stem of a plant that can twine
same as‘蔓’wàn[oft. used in compound words]

origin_definition_cn: 形容像蔓草一样不断向周围扩展
周朝国名,在今河南上蔡西南,后来迁到新蔡一带。
origin_definition_en: Cai, the name of a state during the Zhou Dynasty, located southwest of today's Shangcai, Henan Province, later moved to today's Xincai

origin_definition_cn: 花木、水果等因失去所含的水分而萎缩
origin_definition_en: (of flowers, plants, fruits, etc.) wilt; wizen

origin_definition_cn: 可以做菜吃的草本植物,其中以十字花科和葫芦科的植物居多,如白菜、菜花、萝卜、黄瓜、洋葱、扁豆等。
definition_cn: 可做菜的草本植物总称
origin_definition_en: vegetables; greens; greenstuff; any of various herbaceous plants having parts that are used as food, such as cabbage, cauliflower, radish, cucumber, onion, hyacinth bean, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 落叶灌木,茎细长,蔓生,枝上密生小刺,羽状复叶,小叶倒卵形或长圆形,花白色或淡红色,有芳香。果实可入药。
definition_cn: 落叶灌木,茎细长,蔓生,枝上密生小刺,羽状复叶,小叶倒卵形或长圆形,花白色或淡红色,有芳香。果实可入药。
origin_definition_en: Japan rose (Rosa multiflora); deciduous bush with a long, thin stem, long vine, small thorns closely covering the branches, pinnately compound leaves, small, inverted oval or oval leaves, and usu. white or light red fragrant flowers, whose fruit can be used as medicine

origin_definition_cn: 指某些植物的根和靠近根的茎
origin_definition_en: root and stem of certain plants
(of tree or plant) small of trunk and leaf
(of grass, trees, etc.) luxuriant; lush; grow in abundance

definition_cn: 生物通过生育增加数量

origin_definition_cn: 高等菌类。生长在树林里或草地上。地下部分叫菌丝,能从土壤里或朽木里吸取养料。地上部分由帽状的菌盖和杆状的菌柄构成,菌盖能产生孢子,是繁殖器官。种类很多,有的可以吃,如香菇,有的有毒,如毒蝇蕈。
definition_cn: 高等真菌，由菌盖和菌柄组成，部分可食用，部分有毒
origin_definition_en: gill fungus; higher fungus growing in forests or on grasslands. Its underground part is called mycelium, which can absorb nutrients from the soil or decayed wood, and its above-ground part is comprised of a cap-shaped pileus and bacilliform stipe, with the former being the generative organ producing spores. There are a variety of fungus, some being edible, such as shiitake, while others are poisonous, such as toadstools.

origin_definition_cn: 指某些有像芭蕉那样的大叶子的植物
definition_cn: 具有类似芭蕉大叶的植物
origin_definition_en: plant with large sheath leaves like those of plantain

origin_definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,叶子丛生,狭长而尖,初夏开花,黄绿色,有香味,生在山野。
definition_cn: 一种香草，叶狭长，花黄绿色
origin_definition_en: faber orchis (Cymbidium faberi); perennial, terrestrial mountain herb with narrow, long, pointed leaves and fragrant, greenish-yellow flowers, blooming in early summer

origin_definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,生在山野草地里,根茎长,横生地下,复叶,羽状分裂,下面有繁殖器官,用孢子繁殖。嫩叶供食用,根茎可以制淀粉。全株入药。
definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,生在山野草地里,根茎长,横生地下,复叶,羽状分裂,下面有繁殖器官,用孢子繁殖。嫩叶供食用,根茎可以制淀粉。全株入药。
origin_definition_en: fern; bracken (Pteridium aquilinum); perennial herbaceous plant growing on mountains having a long spreading rhizome and pinnated leaves, and reproducing through spores. Its tender leaves are edible and its rhizome can produce starch. It can be used as medicine.

origin_definition_cn: 指蕲州(旧州名,州治在今湖北蕲春南)。
definition_cn: 古代地名，在今湖北蕲春
origin_definition_en: Qizhou, old name of a prefecture seated south of present-day Qichun, Hubei Province

origin_definition_cn: 蓄积而未显露或未发掘
[薄荷](bò he)多年生草本植物,茎有四棱,叶子对生,花淡紫色,茎和叶子有清凉的香味,可以入药,提炼出来的芳香化合物可加在糖果、饮料里。
origin_definition_en: mint (Mentha); perennial herb with a four-edged stem, opposite leaves and light purplish flowers, both its refreshingly fragrant stems and leaves used as medicine, or processed to be used as essence in candy and beverages

origin_definition_cn: 扁平物上下两面之间的距离小（与厚相对）
origin_definition_en: thin; have little extent from one surface to its opposite; flimsy

origin_definition_cn: 容易挫折、破坏或动摇;不雄厚;不坚强
origin_definition_en: weak; frail; vulnerable to setbacks, damages; lacking in

origin_definition_cn: 君主时代称诸侯或大官等的死
definition_cn: 古代称诸侯或高官死亡
origin_definition_en: (of feudal lords or high officials) die; pass away

origin_definition_cn: 指人或东西聚集的地方

definition_cn: 甘薯、马铃薯等作物统称
origin_definition_en: general designation of such crops as sweet potato and potato

origin_definition_cn: 一种香草。也泛指花草的香。
origin_definition_en: a kind of fragrant grass; (in a broad sense) fragrance of flowers and grasses
Gaocheng, name of a place in Hebei Province
hide; conceal; hide away; stow away; store away

origin_definition_cn: 佛教或道教的经典的总称
definition_cn: 佛教或道教经典的总称
origin_definition_en: general term for Buddhist or Taoist scriptures

definition_cn: 中国西藏自治区的简称
中国少数民族之一，主要分布在西藏

origin_definition_cn: 苔藓植物的一个纲。属于这一纲的植物茎和叶子都很小,绿色,没有根,生在阴湿的地方。
definition_cn: 苔藓植物的一类，茎叶微小，无根，生长在阴湿处
origin_definition_en: moss; any of various plants of the class Musci of bryophytes having tiny stems with tiny leaflike structures and without roots, green in colour and growing in velvety clusters on damp rocks, trees, moist ground, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 莲的地下茎,长形,肥大有节,白色,中间有许多管状的孔,折断后有丝。可以吃。
definition_cn: 莲的地下茎，白色多孔，可食用
origin_definition_en: lotus root; edible long, white and thick jointed underground lotus stem with tubular cavities. When the root snaps, its fibres stay joined.

origin_definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,茎直立,叶子互生,略呈三角形,花黄绿色。嫩叶可以吃。全草入药。
definition_cn: 一种草本植物，嫩叶可食，全草可入药
origin_definition_en: lamb's-quarters (Chenopodium album); annual herb of the goosefoot family, with a vertical stem, alternate deltoid leaves and yellowish-green flowers. Its tender leaves are edible and the whole herb is used for traditional Chinese medicine;

origin_definition_cn: 某些植物的匍匐茎或攀缘茎,如白藤、紫藤、葡萄等的茎。有的可以编制箱子、椅子等。
definition_cn: 植物的攀缘茎，可用于编制物品
origin_definition_en: vine; cane; plant with a long, thin stem that sprawls along the ground or climbs a wall or other support by means of tendrils, such as rattan, Chinese wistaria (Wistaria sinensis) and grapevine, etc., some being used in weaving boxes, suitcases, and chairs

origin_definition_cn: 封建王朝的属国或属地
泛指生长在水中的绿色植物,也包括某些水生的高等植物,如金鱼藻、狸藻等。
origin_definition_en: aquatic plants, including certain higher aquatic plants such as hornwort and bladderwort

origin_definition_cn: 树枝砍去后又长出来的新芽。泛指植物由茎的基部长出的分枝。
definition_cn: 植物茎基部新生的分枝
origin_definition_en: tiller; shoot growing from where a branch is cut off; twig growing from the base of the stem of a plant

origin_definition_cn: 在液体、粉末或糊状的东西里沾一下就拿出来
definition_cn: 将物体短暂浸入液体或粉末中

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物,毛黄色,有黑色的斑纹。听觉和嗅觉都很敏锐,性凶猛,力气大,夜里出来捕食鸟兽,有时伤害人。
definition_cn: 大型猫科动物，黄底黑纹，性凶猛
origin_definition_en: tiger (Panthera tigris); carnivorous mammal with a black striped tawny coat, a keen sense of hearing and olfaction, strong and fierce, preying and feeding on birds and animals at night, sometimes molesting humans as well;

origin_definition_cn: 用残暴狠毒的手段待人
空虚(跟‘实’相对as opposed to‘full’})
因心里惭愧或没有把握而勇气不足
definition_cn: 因心里惭愧或没有把握而勇气不足

origin_definition_cn: 虚假(跟‘实’相对as opposed to‘true’})
指政治思想、方针、政策等方面的道理
origin_definition_en: political work; ideology; policies; theory; guiding principles; abstract

origin_definition_cn: 不自以为是,能够接受别人意见
origin_definition_en: open-minded; modest; ready to listen to others' opinions

origin_definition_cn: 传说中的朝代名,舜所建。
definition_cn: 传说中的朝代名，由舜建立
origin_definition_en: Yu, name of a legendary dynasty founded by Emperor Shun
definition_en: Yu, legendary dynasty founded by Emperor Shun

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今山西平陆东北。
definition_cn: 周朝诸侯国名，位于今山西平陆东北
origin_definition_en: Yu, name of a state in the Zhou Dynasty, to the northeast of present-day Pinglu in Shanxi Province
definition_en: Yu, Zhou Dynasty state in present-day Shanxi

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名。西虢在今陕西宝鸡东,后来迁到河南陕县东南。东虢在今河南郑州西北。
definition_cn: 周朝诸侯国名，分西虢（陕西宝鸡东）和东虢（河南郑州西北）
origin_definition_en: Guo, a state in the Zhou Dynasty. The State of West Guo was east of present-day Baoji, Shaanxi Province before it was moved to the southeast of Shanxian County, Henan Province, while the State of East Guo was located to the northwest of present-day Zhengzhou, Henan Province.
definition_en: Guo, Zhou Dynasty state in Shaanxi and Henan

origin_definition_cn: 植物体受到害虫或真菌的刺激,一部分组织畸形发育而形成的瘤状物。
definition_cn: 植物受虫害或真菌刺激形成的瘤状物
origin_definition_en: gall; lumps or plant tissue deformation caused by pests or bacteria;
definition_en: gall; plant tumor caused by pests

origin_definition_en: small dragon with horns in Chinese mythology

definition_cn: 寄生在人畜体表的小虫

origin_definition_en: same as 虹 hóng in meaning, used alone
definition_en: same as 虹 hóng, pronounced jiàng when used alone

origin_definition_cn: 大气中一种光的现象,天空中的小水珠经日光照射发生折射和反射作用而形成的弧形彩带,由外圈至内圈呈红、橙、黄、绿、蓝、靛、紫七种颜色。出现在和太阳相对着的方向。
definition_cn: 阳光折射雨滴形成的七色弧形光带
origin_definition_en: rainbow; arc or circle displaying concentric bands in the colours of the spectrum (from outer to inner:red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet), formed opposite the sun by the refraction and reflection of the sun's rays through raindrops, spray, or mist;

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫的一科,体长椭圆形,头阔,触角短,复眼大,黑绿色,口吻粗,腹部长大。生活在田野杂草中,雄的吸植物的汁液或花蜜,雌的吸人和动物的血液。幼虫生活在泥土、池沼、稻田中,吃昆虫、草根等。
definition_cn: 吸血昆虫，雌性叮咬人畜
origin_definition_en: horsefly; gadfly; any insect of the family Tabanidae with oval body, wide head, short feelers, large, black and green compound eyes, living in grass, the male feeding on plant sap or nectars, the female on human or animal blood. The larvae live in the soil, marshy land and paddy fields.

origin_definition_cn: 用在上半句,下半句往往有‘可是、但是’等跟它呼应,表示承认甲事为事实,但乙事并不因为甲事而不成立
definition_cn: 承认前事为真，但后事不受影响
origin_definition_en: [oft. used correlatively with 但是 dànshì, 可是kěshì, etc., to indicate that A is factual, but B is not untenable due to A] though; although

origin_definition_cn: 节肢动物,身体长,分头胸部和腹部,体外有壳质的软壳,薄而透明,腹部由多数环节构成,头部有长短触角各一对,胸部的脚第一对最大,末端的形状像钳子。生活在水中,会跳跃,捕食小虫。种类很多,如青虾、龙虾、对虾等。
definition_cn: 水生节肢动物，有透明外壳和钳状足
origin_definition_en: shrimp; arthropod of the genus Crangon, having an elongated body with both cephalothorax and segmented abdomen shielded in long spinelike projection of the carapace, a pair of long antennae and a pair of short feelers, with the first pair of legs being the largest and topped with pincer-like feet, living in the waters, capable of hopping and feeding in insects, in many varieties, such as freshwater shrimp, lobster and prawn
poisonous insects and arachnoids such as scorpion

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫的一科,种类很多,一般体小,呈黑、褐、红等色,触角丝状或棒状,腹部球状,腰部细。营群居生活,分雌蚁、雄蚁、工蚁和兵蚁。雌蚁和雄蚁都有单眼,有翅。工蚁和兵蚁都没有翅,生殖器官不发达。工蚁担任筑巢、采集食物、抚养幼虫等工作。兵蚁负责守卫。
origin_definition_en: ant; any of a variety of insects of the family Formicidae, having a tiny body that is black, brown or red in colour, silky or rod-shaped feelers, a thin waist and a big belly. Ants are gregarious, and classified into female ants, male ants, workers and soldiers. Both the male and female ants have simple eyes and wings. The workers and soldiers have no wings but underdeveloped sexual organs. The workers' job is to build nests, collect food and rear young ants. The soldiers are responsible for keeping guard.

origin_definition_cn: 蛭纲动物,中国常见的是宽体蚂蟥,身体略呈纺锤形,扁平而较肥壮,背面通常暗绿色,前吸盘小。生活在水田、湖沼中,能刺伤皮肤,但不吸血。
definition_cn: 水蛭类动物，不吸血但能刺伤皮肤
origin_definition_en: leech (Hirudo medicinalis); common type of hirudinean which in China has a flat and fat spindle-like body with a greenish dark back and a tiny acetabulum, lives in paddy fields, marshes and lakes, can pierce and hurt the skin, but does not suck blood
Bengbu, a city in Anhui Province

origin_definition_cn: 软体动物,有两个椭圆形介壳,可以开闭。壳表面黑绿色,有环状纹,里面有珍珠层。生活在淡水中,有的种类产珍珠。
definition_cn: 双壳类软体动物，部分产珍珠
origin_definition_en: clam; freshwater mussel; freshwater mollusc with two green-black oval shells with a nacreous lining and ring-like pattern that open and close. Some varieties produce pearls.

origin_definition_cn: 家蚕、柞蚕等的统称,通常专指家蚕。
origin_definition_en: silkworm (Bombyx mori); generic name for the domestic silkworm, tussah, etc., usu. referring to the domestic silkworm

origin_definition_cn: 软体动物,介壳圆形或心脏形,表面有轮状纹。生活在淡水中或河流入海的地方。
origin_definition_en: little mussel (Corbicula leana); small clam living in fresh water or places where the rivers flow into the seas; soft-body animal in round shells or heart-shaped shells with wheel patterns on the surface

origin_definition_cn: [蚯蚓](qiūyǐn)环节动物,身体柔软,圆而长,环节上有刚毛,生活在土壤中,能使土壤疏松,它的粪便能使土壤肥沃,是益虫。
origin_definition_en: earthworm (Lumbricus terrestris); angleworm; fishworm; red worm; dew worm; annelid with a long soft cylindrical body, with bristles on the segments, which burrows into and helps aerate soil, a beneficial creature whose dejecta can enrich soil;

origin_definition_cn: [蚰蜒](yóu yán)节肢动物,像蜈蚣而略小,黄褐色,触角和脚都很细。生活在阴湿的地方。
origin_definition_en: common house centipede (Thereuopoda); centipede-like arthropod, yellowish-brown in colour, with small feelers and legs, living in dark and damp places

origin_definition_cn: 一种多足类的节肢动物
昆虫,像蝗虫,常生活在一个地区,不向外地迁移。危害禾本科、豆科等植物,是害虫。
origin_definition_en: grasshopper; pest of the order Orthoptera resembling the locust, usu. living in one area without migration, harmful to grasses, beans, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 绦虫、血吸虫等动物的幼体
origin_definition_en: larva of a tapeworm or cercaria of a schistosome

origin_definition_cn: 软体动物,壳厚而坚硬,外表淡褐色,有瓦垄状的纵线,内壁白色,边缘有锯齿。肉可食。
definition_cn: 可食用贝类，壳有瓦楞纹
origin_definition_en: blood clam (Arca anadara); type of mollusk with a thick, hard hazel shell resembling rows of roof tiles, white inside, saw-toothed edge, and edible meat;
moth or any other insect that eats books, clothes, wood, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 苍蝇的幼虫,体柔软,有环节,白色,前端尖,尾端钝,或有长尾。多生在粪便、动物尸体和不洁净的地方。
origin_definition_en: maggot; larva of a fly; white, soft-bodied annelid with a pointed front and blunt rear or a long tail, oft. found in excrement, decaying dead animals or unclean places

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物,身体圆而细长,有鳞,没有四肢。种类很多,有的有毒,有的无毒。吃青蛙等小动物,大蛇也能吞食大的兽类。
definition_cn: 无肢爬行动物，部分有毒
origin_definition_en: snake, of the suborder Serpentes; serpent; limbless reptiles with an elongated, round, scaly body, lidless eyes, and a tapering tail, feeding on small animals, such as frogs. Big snakes also devour big beasts, and some species have a poisonous bite.

origin_definition_cn: 传说把许多毒虫放在器皿里使互相吞食,最后剩下不死的毒虫叫蛊,用来放在食物里害人。
origin_definition_en: gu; legendary venomous insect. Legend has it that if many venomous insects were put in a container, they would eat one another. The final survivor was called gu, which could be used to make food poisonous.
ovum produce by a bird, turtle, snake, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 天然的高分子有机化合物,由多种氨基酸组成。是构成生物体活质的最重要部分,是生命的基础,种类很多。旧称朊(ruǎn)。
definition_cn: 生命基础的高分子有机物
origin_definition_en: protein; group of complex organic macromolecules, composed of chains of amino acids. Proteins are fundamental components of all living cells — the bases of life, and are various. formerly known as 朊ruǎn

origin_definition_cn: 鸡蛋和面粉加糖和油制成的松软的糕。
origin_definition_en: cake; soft baked food made of eggs and flour with sugar and oil

origin_definition_cn: 寄生虫,形状像蚯蚓,白色或米黄色,成虫长约4—8寸,雌虫较大。能附着在人的肠壁上引起蛔虫病,进入肝脏、胆道等还会造成其他疾病。
definition_cn: 一种寄生虫，形似蚯蚓，白色或米黄色，成虫长约4-8寸，雌虫较大。寄生在人体肠道内，可引起蛔虫病，若进入肝脏或胆道还会引发其他疾病。
origin_definition_en: roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides); ascarid; bellyworm; white or pale yellow worm shaped like an earthworm, the adults 4-8 cun long and the female being larger than the male, adhering to the intestinal wall in humans, and causing ascariasis. Its presence in the liver and the bile duct may lead to other diseases.

origin_definition_cn: 两栖动物的一科,无尾,后肢长,前肢短,趾有蹼,善于跳跃和泅水。捕食昆虫。种类很多,青蛙是常见的蛙科动物。
definition_cn: 两栖动物的一科，无尾，后肢长，前肢短，趾间有蹼，善于跳跃和游泳。以昆虫为食，种类繁多，青蛙是最常见的蛙科动物。
origin_definition_en: frog, of the genus Rana; tailless amphibian having webbed feet, with short forelegs and long hind legs adapted for leaping and swimming, preying on insects, and coming in a good variety. Frog is a commonly seen ranid.

origin_definition_cn: 蛤蜊、文蛤等瓣鳃类软体动物。
definition_cn: 蛤蜊、文蛤等双壳类软体动物的统称

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物,形似壁虎而大,头大,背部灰色而有红色斑点。吃蚊、蝇等小虫。可入药。
definition_cn: 一种形似壁虎但体型较大的爬行动物，头部较大，背部灰色带红色斑点。以蚊蝇等小虫为食，可入药。
origin_definition_en: Tokay gecko (Gekko gecko); crawling creature that looks like the house lizard but is bigger, has a big head, a grey back with red spots, eats mosquitoes and flies, and is used for Chinese medicine

origin_definition_cn: 软体动物,长约3厘米,壳卵圆形,淡褐色,边缘紫色。生活在浅海底。
definition_cn: 一种长约3厘米的软体动物，壳呈卵圆形，淡褐色边缘紫色，栖息于浅海底。
origin_definition_en: clam (Mactra); mollusk, approximately 3 cm. long, having a light brown round shell with purple edges, living at the bottom of shallow sea
popular term for 文蛤 wéngé
general term for frog and toad;

origin_definition_cn: 环节动物的一纲,体一般长而扁平,无刚毛,前后各有一个吸盘。生活在淡水中或湿润的地方,大多营半寄生生活,如水蛭、蚂蟥等。
definition_cn: 环节动物的一纲，体长而扁平，前后各有一个吸盘，多生活在淡水或湿润处，如水蛭、蚂蟥等。
origin_definition_en: leech; annelids of the class Hirudinea, characterized by an elongated and flat body, having no bristles, with a sucker on both the front or back ends, living in freshwater or humid areas, and mostly clinging to other animals, e.g. bloodsuckers, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 中国古代称南方的民族。
definition_cn: 中国古代对南方民族的称呼
origin_definition_en: ancient name for ethnic peoples in the south

definition_cn: 动物冬眠，潜伏起来不食不动

origin_definition_cn: [蛱蝶](jiádié)蝴蝶的一类,成虫赤黄色,幼虫灰黑色,身上有很多刺。有的吃麻类植物的叶子,对农作物有害。
definition_cn: 蛱蝶，蝴蝶的一类，成虫赤黄色，幼虫灰黑色多刺。部分种类以麻类植物叶子为食，危害农作物。
origin_definition_en: vanessid (Nymphalidae); butterfly whose caterpillar is reddish yellow and whose larva is greyish black with many stings, some feeding on the leaves of hemp, ramie, flax, etc., and therefore being harmful to crops

origin_definition_cn: [蛴螬](qícáo)金龟子的幼虫,白色,圆柱状,向腹面弯曲。生活在土里,吃农作物的根和茎,是害虫。在不同的地区有地蚕、土蚕、核桃虫等名称。
definition_cn: 金龟子的幼虫，白色圆柱状，生活在土中，啃食农作物根茎，是主要害虫。
origin_definition_en: grub; larva of scarab, white in colour and cylindrical in shape that slightly bends towards its belly, living in soil and feeding on the roots and stalks of farm crops, therefore regarded as an insect pest; known variously in different regions as 地蚕dìcán, 土蚕tǔcán or 核桃虫hétáochóng

origin_definition_cn: 完全变态的昆虫由幼虫变为成虫的过渡形态。幼虫生长到一定时期,就不再吃东西,内部组织和外形发生变化,最后变成蛹,一般为枣核形。蛹在条件适合的情况下变为成虫。
definition_cn: 完全变态昆虫从幼虫到成虫的过渡形态，一般为枣核形，条件适宜时羽化为成虫。
origin_definition_en: pupa; transitional form in the development of some insects exhibiting complete metamorphosis from larva to adult. After growing to a certain stage, the larva stops feeding, undergoes changes in its internal tissues and external form, and finally becomes a pupa in the shape of a date stone. The pupa then becomes an adult insect under appropriate conditions.

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今四川成都一带。
definition_cn: 周代诸侯国名，在今四川成都一带
origin_definition_en: Shu, a state in the Zhou Dynasty, comprising the area in and around present-day Chengdu in Sichuan Province
another name for 四川 Sìchuān

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,种类很多,有毒刺,能蜇人,常成群住在一起。
definition_cn: 昆虫的一类，有毒刺能蜇人，多群居
origin_definition_en: any hymenopterous insect of the superfamily Apoidea, with a poisonous sting, usu. living in groups

origin_definition_cn: 蜂、蝎子等用毒刺刺人或动物。
definition_cn: 蜂、蝎子等用毒刺刺人或动物
origin_definition_en: (of bees, scorpions, etc.) sting; prick with a sting

origin_definition_cn: 某些物质刺激皮肤或黏膜使发生微痛
definition_cn: 某些物质刺激皮肤或黏膜产生刺痛感

origin_definition_cn: [蜈蚣](wú gōng)节肢动物,身体长而扁,背部暗绿色,腹部黄褐色,头部有鞭状触角,躯干由许多环节构成,每个环节有一对足。第一对足呈钩状,有毒腺,能分泌毒液。吃小昆虫。可入药。
origin_definition_en: centipede, of the class Chilopoda; long, flat-bodied, many-segmented, insect-eating arthropod, of medical value, with a dark green back and yellowish-brown belly, whip-like feelers to the head and a pair of legs to each segment, the front, hook-like pair of legs having poison glands that secrete venom

definition_cn: 多足类节肢动物，身体由多环节组成，每节有一对足

origin_definition_en: slug (Limax); small snaillike, gastropod mollusc having a slow-moving elongated body with no shell or only a flat rudimentary shell on or under the skin
exuviate; moult; peel; (of snakes, cicadas, etc.) slough off or shed skin
slough; exuviate; (of snakes, cicadas, etc.) skin that has been shed

origin_definition_cn: [蜘蛛](zhīzhū)节肢动物,身体圆形或长圆形,分头胸和腹两部,有触须,雄的触须内有精囊,有脚四对。肛门尖端的突起能分泌黏液,黏液在空气中凝成细丝,用来结网捕食昆虫。生活在屋檐和草木间。
origin_definition_en: spider; any predatory silk-producing arachnid of the order Araneae, having four pairs of legs and a rounded or oval unsegmented body consisting of abdomen and cephalothorax, whose spinnerets produce a mucus that in the air turns into fine silk to form a web to catch insects, living under eaves or among plants, the male having cirrus containing seminal vesicles;

origin_definition_cn: 古书上指蝗虫一类的昆虫。
definition_cn: 古籍中记载的蝗虫类昆虫
origin_definition_en: insects like locusts recorded in ancient books

definition_cn: 蜜蜂采集花蜜酿成的甜物质

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,身体表面有很密的绒毛,前翅比后翅大,雄的触角较长,母蜂和工蜂有毒刺,能蜇人。成群居住。工蜂能采花粉酿蜜,帮助某些植物传粉。蜂蜜、蜂蜡、王浆有很大的经济价值。
definition_cn: 昆虫，能采花粉酿蜜，群居生活。工蜂有毒刺，蜂蜜、蜂蜡等有重要经济价值。
origin_definition_en: honey bee (Apis); bee; four-winged, hairy hymenopteran insect, with the forewings larger than the hind wings. The male has longer feelers, and both the queen and the worker have poisonous, biting stings. The bees often live in organized colonies, with the workers gathering pollen and nectar, and helping some plants to transfer the pollen from a stamen to the upper tip of the pistil of a flower. Honey, beeswax and royal jelly are all of high economic values.

origin_definition_cn: 动物、矿物或植物所产生的油质,具有可塑性,能燃烧,易熔化,不溶于水,如蜂蜡、白蜡、石蜡等。用做防水剂,也可做蜡烛。
definition_cn: 动物、植物或矿物产生的油质，可塑易燃，用于防水或制烛
origin_definition_en: wax, including beeswax, white wax and paraffin wax; substance secreted by some animals or plants or obtained from certain minerals that is plastic, inflammable, meltable, and not dissolvable in water, used for the making of waterproof materials and candles

origin_definition_cn: 用蜡或其他油脂制成的供照明用的东西,多为圆柱形。
definition_cn: 用蜡制成的圆柱形照明用品
origin_definition_en: candle; solid, usu. cylindrical mass of wax or other fatty substance with an axially embedded wick that is burned to provide light

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物,身体表面有细小鳞片,有四肢,尾巴细长,容易断。雄的背面青绿色,有黑色直纹数条,雌的背面淡褐色,两侧各有黑色直纹一条,腹面都呈淡黄色。生活在草丛中,捕食昆虫和其他小动物。
definition_cn: 爬行动物，体表有细鳞，四肢，尾细长易断。栖息草丛中，捕食昆虫。
origin_definition_en: lizard; reptile of the suborder Sauria or Lacertilia, characteristically having an elongated body with tiny scales and a light yellow belly, four legs, and a tapering tail that breaks easily; the male having a bluish green back with black straight stripes, the female having a light brown back with a black straight line on either side, living in weeds, and feeding on insects and tiny animals;

origin_definition_cn: 节肢动物,身体椭圆形,头胸部和腹部合在一起,有四对脚。种类很多,有的吸植物的汁,对农作物害处很大;有的吸人、畜的血,能传染脑炎、回归热、恙虫病等。
definition_cn: 一种节肢动物，体呈椭圆形，头胸部和腹部相连，有四对足。种类繁多，部分吸食植物汁液危害农作物，部分吸食人畜血液并传播脑炎、回归热等疾病。
origin_definition_en: tick (Ixodoidea); arachnid with an elliptic body, four pairs of feet, and its head, thorax, and abdomen overlapping. There are many species:some suck the sap from plants, and are harmful to crops, while others suck the blood of humans or animals, and spread infectious diseases such as cephalitis, relapsing fever, and acariasis.

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,身体细长,胸部的背面有两对膜状的翅,生活在水边,捕食蚊子等小飞虫,能高飞。雌的用尾点水而产卵于水中。幼虫叫水虿,生活在水中。是益虫。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体细长，有两对膜状翅，生活在水边，捕食蚊子等小飞虫。幼虫水生，成虫能高飞，是益虫。
origin_definition_en: dragonfly; mosquito hawk; darning needle; water nymph; beneficial insect of the genus Libellula, with a long slender body and two pairs of thin film wings, living by water and feeding on small winged insects such as mosquitoes, etc., and capable of flying high, the female laying eggs in water with a slight dip of the tail, with its larvae called 水虿shuǐchài

origin_definition_cn: (山脉、河流、道路等)弯弯曲曲地延伸。
definition_cn: 形容山脉、河流、道路等弯曲延伸的样子。
origin_definition_en: (of a mountain, river, road, etc.) serpentine; meander; wind

origin_definition_cn: [蝈蝈儿](guō guor)昆虫,身体绿色或褐色,腹部大,翅膀短,善于跳跃,吃植物的嫩叶和花。雄的前翅有发音器,能发出清脆的声音。有的地区称叫哥哥。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体绿色或褐色，善跳跃，雄性能发声。以植物嫩叶和花为食。
origin_definition_en: katydid; insect of the family Tettigoniidae, with a green or brown body, a big belly and short wings, capable of swift jumps and living on tender leaves and flowers, the male having stridulating organs on the forewings for making a loud thrill sound; also known as 叫哥哥jiàogē ge in some places

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,种类很多,雄的腹部有发音器,能连续不断发出尖锐的声音。幼虫生活在土里,吸食植物的根。成虫刺吸植物的汁。
definition_cn: 昆虫，种类繁多，雄性能连续发出尖锐声音。幼虫生活在土中，成虫吸食植物汁液。
origin_definition_en: cicada (Cicadidae); a kind of insect with many species, the male having a sound-producing organ in its abdomen that continually produces a loud shrill noise, and the larva living in the earth and sucking liquid from roots of plants while the imago sucking sap from plants with a needle-like organ

origin_definition_cn: 蛙或蟾蜍的幼体,黑色,椭圆形,像小鱼,有鳃和尾巴。生活在水中,用尾巴运动,逐渐发育生出后肢、前肢,尾巴逐渐变短而消失,最后变成蛙或蟾蜍。
definition_cn: 蛙或蟾蜍的幼体，黑色椭圆形，有鳃和尾，水生，逐渐发育为成体。
origin_definition_en: tadpole; larva in its aquatic stage, black in colour, oval in shape, looking like a fry with gills and tail, moving about in the water by wagging its tail, and becoming a frog or toad when its tail gradually shortens and disappears and its limbs have appeared and grown

origin_definition_cn: [蝙蝠](biānfú)哺乳动物,头部和躯干像老鼠,四肢和尾部之间有皮质的膜,夜间在空中飞翔,吃蚊、蛾等昆虫。视力很弱,靠本身发出的超声波来引导飞行。
definition_cn: 哺乳动物，形似鼠，有翼膜，夜间飞行，以昆虫为食，靠超声波导航。
origin_definition_en: bat (Chiroptera); flying nocturnal mammal with a mouse-like body and modified forelimbs that serve as wings covered with a membranous skin that extends to the hind limbs, and feeding on insects such as mosquitoes and moths. Having poor sight (hence the expression, ‘blind as a bat’), the bat transmits ultrasonic waves to navigate its flight path.

origin_definition_cn: [蝮蛇](fùshé)毒蛇的一种,头部呈三角形,身体灰褐色,有斑纹。生活在山野和岛上,捕食小动物,也能伤害人或家畜。
definition_cn: 一种毒蛇，头呈三角形，体灰褐色有斑纹，捕食小动物，能伤害人畜。
origin_definition_en: Pallas pit viper (Agkistrodon halys); a species of poisonous snake with a triangular head and striped taupe body, living in mountains, on plains and islands, preying and feeding on small animals, and could hurt man or domestic animals

origin_definition_cn: 甲壳类动物的一属,形状似龙虾而小,第一对足呈螯状。生活在淡水中,是肺吸虫的中间宿主。
definition_cn: 淡水甲壳动物，形似小龙虾，是肺吸虫的中间宿主。
origin_definition_en: crayfish (Cambaroides); small lobster-like freshwater crustacean with a pair of pincers, serving as the intermediate host of the lung fluke

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,翅膀阔大,颜色美丽,静止时四翅竖立在背部,腹部瘦长。吸花蜜。种类很多,有的幼虫吃农作物,是害虫,有的幼虫吃蚜虫,是益虫。
definition_cn: 昆虫，翅大而艳丽，吸食花蜜。部分幼虫危害农作物，部分捕食蚜虫有益。
origin_definition_en: butterfly (Rhopalocera); any of numerous slender-bodied insects with four oft. brightly coloured broad wings that stand erect on the back when at rest, and usu. sucking nectar for food; some caterpillars are pests because they eat crops, and some are beneficial because they eat budworms;

origin_definition_cn: [蝾螈](róngyuán)两栖动物,形状像蜥蜴,头扁,表皮粗糙,背面黑色,腹面红黄色,四肢短,尾侧扁。生活在水中,卵生。幼体形状像蝌蚪。吃小动物。
definition_cn: 两栖动物，形似蜥蜴，水生，卵生，以小型动物为食。
origin_definition_en: salamander (Salamandra terrestris); lizard-like oviparous amphibian with flat head, rough skin, black back and reddish yellow belly, short limbs, and laterally flat tail, living in water and feeding on small animals, with tadpole-like larva

definition_cn: 两栖动物，形似蜥蜴，水生。

origin_definition_cn: [螃蟹](pángxiè)节肢动物,全身有甲壳,眼有柄,足有五对,前面一对长成钳状,叫螯,横着爬。种类很多,通常生长在淡水里的叫河蟹,生长在海里的叫海蟹。
definition_cn: 节肢动物，有甲壳，五对足，第一对呈钳状，横着爬行。分河蟹和海蟹。
origin_definition_en: crab (Cancerpagurus); arthropod with a carapace, moving sideways with five pairs of legs, the first pair of which are modified as pincers, in two categories — freshwater crabs and sea crabs;

definition_cn: 冰雪等由固态变为液态。
资金、商品等在社会上流转。

origin_definition_cn: 节肢动物的一类。有一对或几对单眼,也有无眼的,雄的一般比雌的小,大多数是圆形或椭圆形。有的寄居在人或动物体上,吸血液,能传染疾病。疥虫就是螨类动物。
definition_cn: 节肢动物，多圆形或椭圆形，部分寄生人畜传播疾病。
origin_definition_en: mite; acarid; arthropod of the order Acarina, eyeless, or having several pairs of simple eyes, round or oval body, the male smaller than the female; some are parasites on humans or animals, suck their blood, and can spread diseases. The sarcoptic mite belongs to the family Acaridae.

definition_cn: 蜂、蝎等用毒刺刺人或动物。

origin_definition_cn: 螃蟹等节肢动物的变形的第一对脚,形状像钳子,能开合,用来取食或自卫。
definition_cn: 螃蟹等节肢动物的第一对足，呈钳状，用于取食或自卫。
origin_definition_en: chelae; pincers; (of crab or any other arthropod) pincer-like organ or claw that can open or close for feeding or self-defence

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫,全身绿色或土黄色,头呈三角形,活动灵便,触角呈丝状,胸部细长,翅两对,前腿呈镰刀状。捕食害虫,对农业有益。有的地区叫刀螂。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体绿色或土黄色，前腿镰刀状，捕食害虫，有益农业。
origin_definition_en: mantis; mantid; an insect of the family Mantidae; green or yellowish brown predatory insect having a triangular head, thread-like feelers, slender chest, two pairs of wings, and sickle-shaped forelimbs, regarded as a beneficial insect for its preying on pest insects; known in some regions as 刀螂dāolɑng

origin_definition_cn: 软体动物,体外包着锥形、纺锤形或扁椭圆形的硬壳,上有旋纹,如田螺、海螺。
definition_cn: 软体动物，有螺旋形硬壳，如田螺、海螺。
origin_definition_en: spiral shell; mollusc with a conical, spindle-shaped or flat-oval shell marked with spiral lines, e.g. field snail, conch, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 淡水螺的通称,一般较小。
origin_definition_en: general term for freshwater snails, usu. small

origin_definition_cn: 圆柱形或圆锥形金属杆上带螺纹的零件。
definition_cn: 带螺纹的圆柱形或圆锥形金属零件。
origin_definition_en: screw; cylindrical or conical metal rod with incised spirals;

origin_definition_cn: [螽斯](zhōngsī)昆虫,身体绿色或褐色,触角呈丝状,有的种类无翅。雄虫的前翅有发音器,雌虫尾端有剑状的产卵管。善于跳跃,一般以其他小动物为食物,有的种类也吃庄稼,是害虫。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体绿或褐色，善跳跃，部分危害庄稼。
origin_definition_en: katydid (Microcentrum); long-horned grasshopper; bush cricket; green grasshopper having threadlike antennae (with some species having no wings), soniferous organs on the forewings in the male, and a sword-shaped ovipositor on the tail in the female. A good hopper, the katydid feeds on other minor insects, but some species within the family feed on crops and are harmful.

origin_definition_cn: [蟋蟀](xīshuài)昆虫,身体黑褐色,触角很长,后腿粗大,善于跳跃。尾部有尾须一对。雄的好斗,两翅摩擦能发声。生活在阴湿的地方,吃植物的根、茎和种子,对农业有害。也叫促织,有的地区叫蛐蛐儿。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体黑褐色，善跳跃，雄性好斗能发声，危害农作物。
origin_definition_en: cricket (Gryllus chinensis); insect having a darkish brown body, usu. long feelers, well-developed hind legs that enable it to hop agilely, and a pair of cercopods on its tail, living in dankness, and deemed harmful to farm crops for it feeds on roots, stalks and seeds, the male being very belligerent and capable of making a singing sound by friction of its two wings; also 促织cùzhī; known in some areas as 蛐蛐儿qū qur

origin_definition_cn: [蟑螂](zhāngláng)昆虫,体扁平,黑褐色, 能发出臭味。常咬坏衣物, 并能传染伤寒、霍乱等疾病,是害虫。
definition_cn: 昆虫，体扁平黑褐，散发臭味，咬坏衣物并传播疾病。
origin_definition_en: cockroach; roach; harmful insect of the order Dictyoptera, with a flat, dark brown body giving forth an offensive odour, eating clothes, and spreading diseases such as typhoid fever and cholera;

origin_definition_cn: 两栖动物,身体表面有许多疙瘩,内有毒腺,能分泌黏液,吃昆虫、蜗牛等小动物,对农业有益。
definition_cn: 两栖动物，体表多疙瘩，分泌毒液，捕食昆虫有益农业。
origin_definition_en: toad (Bufonidae); frog-like amphibian whose skin is studded with small swellings with venomous glands that can produce a white, sticky mucus, and which feeds on insects and snails and is good for agriculture;

origin_definition_cn: 昆虫的一科,成虫体很小,褐色或黑色,触角细长,翅短而宽。幼虫长圆柱状,灰白色或带黄白色,表面光滑。蛹长椭圆形,褐色。卵长纺锤形,黄白色。某些雌蠓吸食人畜的血液。有些蠓能传染疾病。

origin_definition_en: biting midge (Ceratopogonidae); minute bloodsucking insect. Adults have a small brown or black body with long, fine feelers and short, wide wings while the larvae have a long, round, greyish white or yellowish white body and smooth skin. The pupae are oval brown, the eggs spindle-shaped, and yellowish white. Certain female midges suck the blood of human beings or animals; can spread disease.

origin_definition_cn: 炊具,样子像鼎,足部中空。
origin_definition_en: ancient cooking tripod with hollow legs

origin_definition_cn: 迷信的人所说的人死后的灵魂。
origin_definition_en: supernatural being; ghost; phantom; spirit; apparition; shade; spook

origin_definition_cn: 称有不良嗜好或行为的人(含厌恶意

definition_cn: 形容行为隐秘、不光明正大

origin_definition_cn: 不可告人的打算或勾当
definition_cn: 指不可告人的阴谋或不正当行为
形容事物恶劣或糟糕（仅作定语使用）

origin_definition_cn: 机灵(多指小孩儿或动物
definition_cn: 形容小孩或动物聪明机灵
origin_definition_en: usu. referring to a child or animal
definition_en: clever; smart (usually of children or animals)

definition_cn: 古代天文学二十八宿之一
origin_definition_en: gui, one of the 28 lunar constellations in ancient Chinese astronomy
definition_en: Gui, one of the 28 lunar constellations

definition_cn: 指在某个领域中位居首位的人或事物

origin_definition_cn: 北斗七星中成斗形的四颗星。一说指其中离斗柄最远的一颗。
definition_cn: 北斗七星中组成斗形的四颗星，或指其中最远的一颗
origin_definition_en: four stars in the bowl of the Big Dipper, or the one at the tip of the bowl
definition_en: four stars forming the bowl of the Big Dipper

origin_definition_cn: (Kuíxīng)中国神话中所说的主宰文章兴衰的神。旧时很多地方都有魁星楼、魁星阁等建筑物。
definition_cn: 神话中主宰文章兴衰的神，古代建有魁星楼等建筑供奉
origin_definition_en: god that governs literature and writing in Chinese mythology. In ancient times, there were many pavilions built to honour the god, such as the Pavilion of Kuixing and the Tower of Kuixing.

definition_cn: 指人的精神或情绪状态

origin_definition_en: variant pronunciation for 魄 pò as in 落魄 luòpò
definition_en: alternative pronunciation for 魄 in 落魄

origin_definition_cn: 迷信的人指依附于人的身体而存在的精神
definition_cn: 迷信认为依附人体存在的精神
origin_definition_en: soul; spiritual matter believed by superstitious people as dependent on human's body

origin_definition_cn: 指处置事情所具有的胆识和果断的作风。
definition_cn: 处理事情时表现出的胆识和决断力
origin_definition_en: daring and resolution; boldness; courage and decisiveness in handling matters

definition_cn: 能够强烈吸引人的特质

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今河南北部、陕西东部、山西西南部和河北南部等地。
definition_cn: 周朝诸侯国名，位于今河南北部等地
origin_definition_en: Wei, one of the states during the Zhou Dynasty, occupying present-day northern Henan, eastern Shaanxi, southwestern Shanxi, and southern Hebei

origin_definition_cn: 三国之一,公元220—265,曹丕所建,领有今黄河流域各省和湖北、安徽、江苏北部,辽宁中部。
origin_definition_en: Wei (220-265), one of the kingdoms during the Three Kingdoms Period (220-280), occupying the present-day provinces in the Yellow River valley and what is now northern Hubei, Anhui, and Jiangsu and central Liaoning
Northern Wei, one of the Northern Dynasties (386-581)

definition_cn: 宗教传说中的邪恶精灵

origin_definition_cn: 杂技的一种,以迅速敏捷的技巧或特殊装置把实在的动作掩盖起来,使观众感觉到物体忽有忽无,变化不测。
definition_cn: 通过特殊技巧制造幻觉的表演艺术
origin_definition_en: magic; conjuring; sleight of hand; a kind of acrobatics or a performing skill of producing baffling effects or illusions by sleight of hand, concealed apparatus, etc.;

origin_definition_cn: 宗教或神话传说里指迷惑人、害人性命的鬼怪。
definition_cn: 宗教传说中害人的邪恶鬼怪

origin_definition_cn: 生活在水中的脊椎动物,体温随外界温度而变化,一般身体侧扁,有鳞和鳍,用鳃呼吸。种类极多,大部分可供食用或制鱼胶。
definition_cn: 水生脊椎动物，大多可食用
origin_definition_en: fish; a vertebrate living in water, usu. with a flat body and having permanent gills for breathing, with scales and fins, the body temperature changing with the surrounding temperature, coming in many species, most of which can be used for food or making fish glue
squid; calamary; common name for 枪乌贼qiāngwūzéi

definition_cn: 形容人反应迟钝或愚笨

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今山东曲阜一带。
definition_cn: 周朝诸侯国名，位于今山东曲阜
origin_definition_en: State of Lu; one of the warring states into which China was divided during the Eastern Zhou Dynasty (770-256 B.C.), in the Qufu area of present-day Shandong Province

origin_definition_cn: 鱼,形状跟鳊鱼相似而较宽,银灰色,胸部略平,腹部中央隆起。生活在淡水中。
definition_cn: 淡水鱼，形似鳊鱼但较宽
origin_definition_en: triangular bream (Megalobrama terminalis); silvery grey freshwater fish resembling bream, with a flat breast and bulging belly

origin_definition_cn: 鲇鱼,身体表面多黏液,无鳞,背部苍黑色,腹面白色,头扁口阔,上下颌有4根须,尾圆而短,不分叉,背鳍小,臀鳍与尾鳍相连。生活在河湖池沼等处,白昼潜伏水底泥中,夜晚出来活动,吃小鱼、贝类、蛙等。
origin_definition_en: catfish (Siluriformes); a species of fish with a scaleless body covered with mucus, a black back and white belly, flat head, wide mouth, two pairs of barbels on its upper and lower jaws, short round tail without a fork, small dorsal fin, and fused anal and tail fins. Living in rivers, lakes and ponds, this nocturnal fish, hiding in riverbed mud during daytime, feeds on small fish, shellfish, frogs, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 鲈鱼,身体上部青灰色,下部灰白色,身体两侧和背鳍有黑斑。生活在近海,秋末到河口产卵。
definition_cn: 近海鱼类，秋季到河口产卵
origin_definition_en: perch (Lateolabrax japonicus); fish with a greenish grey back and greyish white belly, and black spots on both sides of the body and the dorsal fin, living in offshore waters and spawning at river estuaries in late autumn

origin_definition_cn: 鱼类的一科,身体大,略呈纺锤形,鳞细而圆,是重要的食用鱼类。常见的有大麻哈鱼。
definition_cn: 重要食用鱼类，如大麻哈鱼
origin_definition_en: salmon (Salmo); family of fish with large bodies shaped slightly like spindles, round fine scales, and seen as an important food fish. Chum is one of the commonly found members of the family.

origin_definition_cn: 分明而确定,一点也不含糊
鲟鱼,背部黄灰色,口小而尖,背部和腹部有大片硬鳞。生活在淡水中,有些入海越冬。
definition_cn: 鲟鱼，一种大型淡水鱼，背部黄灰色，口小尖，身披硬鳞，部分种类会洄游至海越冬
origin_definition_en: sturgeon; fish of the family Acipenseridae with a yellowish grey back, a small and pointed mouth, and large hard scales on the back and belly, living in fresh water and sometimes swimming to the sea for the winter

origin_definition_cn: 鲢鱼,身体侧扁,鳞细,背部青黑色,腹部白色,是中国重要的淡水鱼类之一。
definition_cn: 鲢鱼，淡水鱼，体侧扁，鳞细，背青腹白，是中国主要养殖鱼类之一
origin_definition_en: silver carp (Hypophthalmichthys molitrix); flat fish with small scales, green-black back and white belly; one of the important freshwater fishes in China;

origin_definition_cn: 鱼,身体纺锤形,侧扁,两侧有数条浓青色纵线,嘴尖。生活在热带海洋中。
definition_cn: 鱼,身体纺锤形,侧扁,两侧有数条浓青色纵线,嘴尖。生活在热带海洋中。
origin_definition_en: oceanic bonito (Katsuwonus pelamis); skipjack tuna; spindle-like and laterally flat fish with some dark green vertical lines on both sides of the body and a pointed mouth, living in tropical seas

origin_definition_cn: 鲤鱼,身体侧扁,背部苍黑色,腹部黄白色,嘴边有须一对。是中国重要的淡水鱼类之一。
definition_cn: 鲤鱼，淡水鱼，体侧扁，背苍黑腹黄白，嘴边有须，是中国重要食用鱼
origin_definition_en: carp (Cyprinus carpio); flat fish with a black back, a yellowish-white belly and a pair of feelers by the mouth, one of China's important freshwater fishes

origin_definition_cn: 鲫鱼,体侧扁,头部尖,中部高,尾部较窄,生活在淡水中,是常见的食用鱼。
definition_cn: 鲫鱼，常见淡水食用鱼，体侧扁，头尖腹大
origin_definition_en: crucian carp (Carassius auratus); common edible fish with a laterally flat body, a pointed head, a narrow tail and a big belly, living in fresh water

origin_definition_cn: 鱼,体侧扁,头短,口小,背部青灰色,腹部银白色。生活在淡水中,不耐低温,是珠江流域等地区的重要经济鱼类。
definition_cn: 鱼,体侧扁,头短,口小,背部青灰色,腹部银白色。生活在淡水中,不耐低温,是珠江流域等地区的重要经济鱼类。
origin_definition_en: mud carp (Cirrhina molitorella); laterally flat fish with a short head, small mouth, lime greenish back, and silvery white stomach. Living in freshwater and unable to endure low temperatures, it is important for fish farming in areas such as the Pearl River Valley.

origin_definition_cn: 鲳鱼,身体短而侧扁,没有腹鳍。生活在海洋中。
definition_cn: 鲳鱼，海鱼，体短侧扁，无腹鳍
origin_definition_en: butterfish (Stromateidae); silvery pomfret; marine fish with a short, laterally flat body without abdominal fin;

origin_definition_cn: 鱼类的一属,体长30厘米左右,侧扁,口小。生活在河流、湖泊中,吃藻类和其他水生植物。
definition_cn: 鱼类的一属,体长30厘米左右,侧扁,口小。生活在河流、湖泊中,吃藻类和其他水生植物。
origin_definition_en: silvery chub (Xenocypris argentea); a kind of fish with a small mouth, about 30 centimetres long, laterally flat, growing in rivers and lakes and feeding on algae and other water plants
salamander, general term for Megalobatrachus davidianus and Hynobius chinensis

origin_definition_cn: 鱼类的一属,身体侧扁,背部稍微凸起,头大,口小,侧线发达。生活在海里。最常见的是真鲷。
definition_cn: 鲷鱼，海鱼，体侧扁，头大口小，真鲷为常见品种
origin_definition_en: porgy (Calamus); sea fish with a laterally flat body, slightly bulging back, big head, small mouth, and well-developed lateral lines. The most common kind of which is the porgy.

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物,种类很多,生活在海洋中,胎生,形状像鱼,体长可达30多米,是现在世界上最大的动物,前肢形成鳍,后肢完全退化,尾巴变成尾鳍,鼻孔在头的上部,用肺呼吸。肉可以吃,脂肪可以制油,用于医药和其他工业。俗称鲸鱼。
definition_cn: 鲸，海洋哺乳动物，现存最大动物，形似鱼，用肺呼吸
origin_definition_en: whale; viviparous aquatic mammal of a large variety that lives in the sea and superficially resembles a large fish, its body length can reach 30 metres or more. It is the largest living animal in the world, whose forelegs have evolved into fins, whose hind legs have totally degenerated and whose tail has changed into the caudal fin. Its nostrils are situated on the upper part of the head, and it breathes with lungs; its meat is edible, and its fat can be used to produce oil, and is used in pharmaceuticals and other industries. 俗称 popularly called 鲸鱼 jīngyú

origin_definition_cn: 鲻鱼,身体长,前部圆,后部侧扁,头短而扁,吻宽而短,眼大,鳞片圆形,没有侧线。生活在浅海或河口咸水和淡水交汇处。是常见的食用鱼。
definition_cn: 鲻鱼，常见食用海鱼，体长，生活在咸淡水交汇处
origin_definition_en: mullet; common food fish of the family Mullidae or the family Mugilidae, with a long body, round in the front and laterally flat in the rear, short flat head, broad and short snout, big eyes, circular scales, and no lateral lines, living in continental seas or at the convergence of salt and fresh waters at river mouths

origin_definition_cn: 某些水生动物的呼吸器官,多为羽毛状、板状或丝状,用来吸取溶解在水中的氧。
definition_cn: 某些水生动物的呼吸器官,多为羽毛状、板状或丝状,用来吸取溶解在水中的氧。
origin_definition_en: gill; branchia; respiratory organ of certain aquatic animals, mostly feathery, tabular or filamentary, for inhaling dissolved oxygen from water

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物的一属,大的身体长达3—6米,四肢短,尾巴长,全身有灰褐色的硬皮。善于游泳,性凶恶,捕食鱼、蛙和鸟类,有的也吃人、畜。多产在热带和亚热带,其中扬子鳄是中国的特产。
definition_cn: 鳄，大型爬行动物，性凶猛，多产于热带地区
origin_definition_en: crocodile (Crocodylidae); alligator; a kind of reptile, the largest of which is 3-6 metres long, with short limbs, a long tail and greyish brown hard skin. Of a ferocious nature, the crocodile is a good swimmer and feeds on fish, frogs, birds, and even domesticated animals and sometimes human beings. Crocodiles mostly live in tropical and subtropical regions, among which the Chinese alligator is a rare species.

origin_definition_cn: 鳊鱼,身体侧扁,头小而尖,鳞较细。生活在淡水中。
definition_cn: 鳊鱼，淡水鱼，体侧扁，头小尖
origin_definition_en: bream (Abramis); freshwater fish with a flat body, a small and pointed head, and fine scales

origin_definition_cn: 传说中海里的大龟或大鳖。
鱼类的运动器官,由刺状的硬骨或软骨支撑薄膜构成。按它所在的部位,可分为胸鳍、腹鳍、背鳍、臀鳍和尾鳍。
definition_cn: 鳍，鱼类的运动器官，分胸鳍、腹鳍、背鳍等
origin_definition_en: fin; flattened appendage consisting of spinous bones or cartilages that form the framework for a membrane cover, attached to various parts of a fish, including pectoral fin, pelvic fin, dorsal fin, anal fin and tail fin
man who has no wife or has lost his wife; wifeless; widowered

origin_definition_cn: 鳓鱼,身体侧扁,银白色,头小,鳃孔大,无侧线。生活在海中。
definition_cn: 鳓鱼，海鱼，体侧扁银白，无侧线
origin_definition_en: Chinese herring (Ilisha elongata); silver-white sea fish having a laterally flat body without lateral lines, a small head and big gill slit;

origin_definition_cn: 某些鱼类体内可以胀缩的囊状物。里面充满氮、氧、二氧化碳等混合气体。收缩时鱼下沉,膨胀时鱼上浮。有的鱼类的鳔有辅助听觉或呼吸等作用。
definition_cn: 鱼鳔，鱼类控制浮沉的器官
origin_definition_en: swimming bladder; air bladder in the body of a fish filled with a mixture of nitrogen, oxygen, carbon dioxide and other gases and, capable of expanding and contracting, swelling when the fish swims to the surface and shrinking when it swims deep into the water. The bladders of certain species of fish help it hear and respire.

origin_definition_cn: 鳕鱼,下颌有一根须,背部有许多小黑斑,有三个背鳍,腹部灰白色。肝可制鱼肝油。
definition_cn: 鳕鱼，海鱼，下颌有须，肝可制鱼肝油
origin_definition_en: cod (Gadus morrhua); fish with an antenna on its lower jaw, small black dots on its back, three dorsal fins and an off-white belly, its liver used to make cod-liver oil;

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物,生活在水中,形状像龟,背甲上有软皮。
definition_cn: 爬行动物,生活在水中,形状像龟,背甲上有软皮。
origin_definition_en: Chinese soft-shelled turtle (Trionyx sinensis), reptile similar to a tortoise that has a hard outer shell with a soft edge and that lives in water; soft-shelled turtle;

origin_definition_cn: 鳙鱼,身体暗黑色,鳞细,头大,眼睛靠近头的下部。生活在淡水中,是重要的食用鱼。
definition_cn: 鳙鱼，淡水食用鱼，头大眼低位
origin_definition_en: big-head carp (Aristichthys nobilis); variegated carp; dark black fish with small scales, a big head, and eyes close to the lower part of its head, living in fresh water and used for food;

origin_definition_cn: 鳜鱼,口大,鳞片细小,背部黄绿色,全身有黑色斑点。生活在淡水中,是中国的特产。有的地区叫花鲫鱼。
definition_cn: 鳜鱼，中国特产淡水鱼，身有黑斑
origin_definition_en: mandarin fish (Siniperca chuatsi); freshwater fish having a big mouth, tiny scales, greenish yellow back with black spots, a specialty in China; known in some areas as 花鲫鱼huājìyú
eel; finless eel; usu. the yellow eel

origin_definition_cn: 鱼类、爬行动物和少数哺乳动物身体表面具有保护作用的薄片状组织,由角质、骨质等构成。
definition_cn: 鱼类、爬行动物和少数哺乳动物身体表面具有保护作用的薄片状组织,由角质、骨质等构成。
origin_definition_en: scale; thin, flat plates forming a protective surface on fish, reptiles and a few mammals, composed of cutin, sclerotin, etc.
scale-like; like the scales of a fish

origin_definition_cn: 鳟鱼,背部淡青稍带褐色,侧线下部银白色,全身有黑点。
definition_cn: 鳟鱼，淡水鱼，背淡青有黑点
origin_definition_en: brown trout (Salmo trutta), having black specks, a pale green and slightly brown back and a silver-white belly

origin_definition_cn: 脊椎动物的一纲,体温恒定,卵生,嘴内无齿,全身有羽毛,胸部有龙骨突起,前肢变成翼,后肢能行走。一般的鸟都会飞,也有的两翼退化,不能飞行。燕、鹰、鸡、鸭、鸵鸟等都属于鸟类。
definition_cn: 鸟，卵生脊椎动物，有羽毛和翅膀
origin_definition_en: bird; oviparity and a family of the vertebrate, having invariable body temperature, no teeth, a body covered with feather, protruding keels in the chest, wings evolved from the forelimbs, and rear limbs that can walk. Normally a bird can fly, but some have lost the ability because of degenerated wings. The swallow, eagle, chicken, duck, ostrich, etc. belong to this family.

origin_definition_cn: 家禽,品种很多,嘴短,上嘴稍弯曲,头部有肉质的冠。翅膀短,不能高飞。
definition_cn: 家禽,品种很多,嘴短,上嘴稍弯曲,头部有肉质的冠。翅膀短,不能高飞。
origin_definition_en: chicken; domestic fowl, of diverse breeds, with a fleshy cockscomb, a short beak whose upper mandible is slightly crooked, and wings that are too short for flying high;
(of bird, animal or insect) chirp; cry

origin_definition_cn: 表达;发表(情感、意见、主张)
鸟类的一科,多生活在海边,主要捕食鱼类,头大,嘴扁平,前趾有蹼,翼长而尖,羽毛多为白色,如海鸥。
origin_definition_en: gull (Laridae); family of aquatic birds, mostly living at the seaside, with a large head, flat beak, webbed toes, long, pointed wings, and usu. white plumage, feeding mainly on fish, e.g. the seagull

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一属,全身多为黑色,嘴大,翼长,脚有力。常见的有乌鸦、寒鸦等。
origin_definition_en: crow (Corvus); bird usu. black in colour and having a large beak, long wings and vigorous limbs. Corbie and jackdaw are two common crow breeds.

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一属,头小,颈长,背部平,尾巴短,不善于飞,能涉水。大鸨就属于这一属。
origin_definition_en: bustard; any bird of the family Otididae featuring small head, long neck, flat back, and short tail, not good at flying but capable of wading across waters. Great bustard belongs to this family.

definition_cn: 旧时指开设妓院并管理妓女的女性
一种善于潜水捕鱼的水鸟

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一科，嘴扁腿短，趾间有蹼，善游泳，有家鸭、野鸭两种。肉供食用，毛用来絮被子、羽绒服或填充枕头。通常指家鸭。
definition_cn: 常见水禽，嘴扁腿短，趾间有蹼，善游泳，分家鸭和野鸭两种。肉可食用，羽毛可用于制作羽绒制品
origin_definition_en: duck; drake; duckling; wild or domesticated swimming bird of the family Anatidae, characterized by a flat bill, short legs and webbed feet, whose meat is used as food and whose down is a material for padding quilts, snow jackets or pillows. The term usually refers to domestic duck.

definition_cn: 古代文献中记载的鹞鹰类猛禽

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,像野鸭,体形较小,嘴扁,颈长,趾间有蹼,善游泳,翼长,能飞。雄鸟有彩色羽毛,头后有铜赤、紫、绿等色的长冠毛,嘴红色。雌鸟羽毛苍褐色,嘴灰黑色,雌雄多成对生活在水边。文学上用来比喻夫妻。
definition_cn: 小型水鸟，雄鸟羽毛艳丽，雌鸟羽毛灰褐，常成对生活。在文学中象征恩爱夫妻
origin_definition_en: mandarin duck (Aix galericulata); bird resembling wild duck but smaller, having a flat beak, a long neck, webbed feet, and long wings, able to fly and good at swimming, the male having colourful feathers and a long reddish brown, purple or green aigrette, while the female having dark brown feathers and a dark grey beak, oft. living in couples at waterside. They are compared to husband and wife in literature.

origin_definition_cn: 一种小鸟，猫头鹰的一种
definition_cn: 猫头鹰的一种小型品种

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,翅膀大,善于飞行,品种很多,羽毛有白色、灰色、酱紫色等,以谷类植物的种子为食物,有的可以用来传递书信。常用做和平的象征。
definition_cn: 善飞鸟类，品种多样，羽毛颜色各异，可用于传信，象征和平
origin_definition_en: pigeon (Columba livia); dove; a variety of bird with large wings, wonderful flying skill, and feathers ranging in colour from white to grey and dark reddish purple, eating grain, sometimes used for carrying letters, oft. a symbol of peace

definition_cn: 神话传说中类似凤凰的神鸟
origin_definition_en: fabulous bird related to the phoenix

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,羽毛黑褐色,天要下雨或刚晴的时候,常在树上咕咕地叫。
definition_cn: 羽毛黑褐色的鸟类，常在雨前或雨后鸣叫
origin_definition_en: wood pigeon (Columba palumbus), bird with dark brown feather that oft. coos in the trees before rain or just after it clears;

origin_definition_cn: 家禽,羽毛白色或灰色,额部有橙黄色或黑褐色肉质突起,雄的突起较大。颈长,嘴扁而阔,脚有蹼,能游泳,耐寒,吃青草、谷物、蔬菜、鱼虾等。
definition_cn: 大型家禽，颈长嘴阔，善游泳，肉、蛋可食用
origin_definition_en: goose (Anser domestica); domesticated bird with white or grey feathers, a long neck, a flat and wide beak, webbed feet, and an orange or brown fleshy crown on its forehead, the male having a bigger crown than the female, good at swimming, cold-resistant, and feeding on grass, grain, vegetables, fish, shrimp, etc.

origin_definition_cn: [鹈鹕](tíhú)水鸟,体长可达2米,翼大,嘴长,尖端弯曲,嘴下有一个皮质的囊,可以存食,羽毛白色,翼上有少数黑色羽毛。善于游泳和捕鱼。喜群居。
definition_cn: 大型水鸟，嘴下有皮囊，善捕鱼
origin_definition_en: pelican; gregarious waterfowl of the family Pelecanidae, having a body up to two metres long, white feathers, large wings with a few black feathers, a long beak with a bent tip and a distensible pouch which hangs from the large lower mandible and which is used to scoop up or store fish, good at swimming and catching fish;

origin_definition_cn: [鹌鹑](ān chún)鸟,头小,尾巴短,羽毛赤褐色,不善飞。
origin_definition_en: quail (Coturnix); bobwhite; small bird with tiny head and short tail and brownish feathers, not good at flying;
roc; mythological bird of the largest size

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,背部褐色,头、颈和腹部白色。性凶猛。在树上或岩石上筑巢,常在水面上飞翔,吃鱼类。
origin_definition_en: osprey (Pandion haliaetus); fish hawk; sea eagle (Haliaeetus); bird having a brown back, a white head, neck and belly and a ferocious nature, building nests on trees and rocks, oft. flying over water, and feeding on fish;

definition_cn: 古代文献记载的一种鸟类
origin_definition_en: guzhou, bird described in ancient books

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一属,头小颈长,嘴长而直,脚细长,羽毛白色或灰色,群居或双栖,常在河边或海岸捕食鱼和昆虫。常见的有白鹤、灰鹤等。
definition_cn: 大型涉禽，颈腿细长，羽毛多为白色或灰色
origin_definition_en: crane (Gruidae); bird genus, with small head and long neck, long straight bill, long thin legs, and white or grey feathers, living in groups or in pairs, and often catching fish and insects on riversides or sea coasts. The common species are the white crane and grey crane.

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,头部圆,上嘴大,呈钩状,下嘴短小,羽毛美丽, 有白、赤、黄、绿等色。生活在热带树林里,吃果实。能模仿人说话的声音。
definition_cn: 色彩艳丽的鸟类，能模仿人声
origin_definition_en: parrot; bird of the family Psittacidae that has a round head, a large hooked upper bill, a short small lower bill, and bright feathers in white, red, yellow or green, living in tropical forests, eating fruits, and being capable of mimicking human voice;

origin_definition_cn: [鹧鸪](zhègū)鸟,背部和腹部黑白两色相杂,头顶棕色,脚黄色。吃昆虫、蚯蚓、植物的种子等。
definition_cn: 羽毛黑白相间的小型鸟类
origin_definition_en: francolin; partridge of the genus Francolinus; bird with black and white feathers on its back and breast, brown feathers on its head, and yellow claws, eating insects, earthworms, seeds, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 鸟的一属,体色暗淡,嘴细长,腿长,趾间没有蹼。常在浅水边或水田中吃小鱼、贝类、昆虫等,是候鸟。
definition_cn: 长嘴长腿的涉禽，常在浅水区觅食
origin_definition_en: sandpiper; snipe; migratory bird of the family Scolopacidae, having grey feathers, a long thin bill, long legs, and feet that are not webbed, feeding on small fish, shells, insects, etc. on shores or in paddy fields

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一科,嘴直而尖,颈长,飞翔时缩着颈。白鹭、苍鹭较为常见。
definition_cn: 长颈长嘴的涉禽，飞行时缩颈
origin_definition_en: heron; bird of the family Ardeidae with a straight and pointed beak, and a long neck, which flies with a shrunk neck, its common breeds being white egret and heron

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一科,一般指鹰属的鸟类,上嘴呈钩形,颈短,脚部有长毛,足趾有长而锐利的爪。性凶猛,捕食小兽及其他鸟类。
definition_cn: 大型猛禽，钩嘴利爪，捕食其他动物
origin_definition_en: hawk; eagle; bird of the genus Accipiter, family Accipitridae that has a hooked upper beak, short neck, and long-feathered feet with long and sharp claws; distinguished by its fierce character, preying on small animals and other birds

origin_definition_cn: 鸟类的一属,形状像白鹤,嘴长而直,羽毛灰色、白色或黑色。生活在水边,吃鱼、虾等。较常见的有白鹳。
definition_cn: 大型涉禽，形似鹤，嘴长直
origin_definition_en: stork; bird of the family Ciconiidae, which looks like a white crane, with a long and straight bill, and grey, white or black feathers, living on the waterside and feeding on fish and shrimps. The white stork is quite common.

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物反刍类的一科,种类很多,四肢细长,尾巴短,一般雄兽头上有角,个别种类雌的也有角,毛多是褐色,有的有花斑或条纹,听觉和嗅觉都很灵敏。
definition_cn: 哺乳动物，多数雄性有角，听觉嗅觉灵敏
origin_definition_en: deer; ruminant mammal of the family Cervidae, with long, slender limbs, a short tail, brown hair and antlers for the male and also for the female of some species, some with spots or stripes on the body, having sharp hearing and smelling senses

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物的一属,是小型的鹿,雄的有长牙和短角。腿细而有力,善于跳跃,毛棕色,皮很柔软,可以制革。
origin_definition_en: muntjac; a mammal of the genus Muntiacus, the males having short horns, long teeth, slender and strong legs that are good for leaping, brown hair, and soft hide that is a good material for leather making;
river deer; roe as recorded in ancient books

origin_definition_cn: 传说中的一种动物,形状像鹿,头上有角,全身有鳞甲,有尾。古人拿它象征祥瑞。
definition_cn: 传说中的祥瑞之兽，形似鹿而有鳞甲
origin_definition_en: kylin; Chinese unicorn; Chinese mythological animal akin to deer, sporting antlers on the head and a tail, covered all over with scales, regarded by ancients as a mascot;
foot of a mountain or a hill

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物,形状像鹿而小,无角,前腿短,后腿长,善于跳跃,尾巴短,毛黑褐色或灰褐色。雄麝的犬齿很发达,肚脐和生殖器之间有腺囊,能分泌麝香。
definition_cn: 小型鹿类，雄性能分泌麝香
origin_definition_en: musk deer (Moschus moschiferus); mammal which looks like a deer but is smaller, hornless, having short forelegs, long hind legs, a short tail and blackish brown or greyish brown hair, good at jumping. The male has well-developed canine teeth and a sac (musk bag) between the navel and the reproductive organ that secretes musk.

origin_definition_cn: 一年生或二年生草本植物,子实用来磨面粉,也可以用来制糖或酿酒,是中国北方重要的粮食作物。有小麦、大麦、黑麦、燕麦等多种。
definition_cn: 一年生或二年生草本植物，子实可磨面粉、制糖或酿酒，是中国北方主要粮食作物。包括小麦、大麦、黑麦、燕麦等。
origin_definition_en: wheat (Triticum); annual or biannual cereal grass that is a major crop in north China, bearing a kind of grain to be ground into flour or used to make sugar or brew alcoholic beverages, including wheat, barley, rye, oat, etc.
definition_en: wheat; cereal grass cultivated in northern China, including wheat, barley, rye, oat, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 通常指小麦磨成面筛过后剩下的麦皮和碎屑。
definition_cn: 小麦磨面后筛出的麦皮和碎屑。
origin_definition_en: (wheat) bran; usu. ground husks of wheat separated from flour meal;

origin_definition_cn: 大麻、亚麻、苎麻、黄麻、剑麻、蕉麻等植物的统称。
definition_cn: 大麻、亚麻、苎麻等植物的统称。
origin_definition_en: hemp (Cannabis sativa); any plants resembling hemp, such as flax, ramie, jute, sisal hemp, abaca, etc.
definition_en: hemp; plants like flax, ramie, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 麻类植物的纤维,是纺织等工业的重要原料。
definition_cn: 麻类植物的纤维，用于纺织等工业。
origin_definition_en: fibre of hemp, a major textile material
feeling slight prickles, stings or tremors; tingling; numb

origin_definition_cn: 人出天花后留下的疤痕
definition_cn: 天花痊愈后留下的疤痕。

origin_definition_cn: 身体某部发生像蚂蚁爬那样不舒服的感觉或感觉完全丧失
definition_cn: 身体某部分感觉丧失或不适。
origin_definition_en: numb; prickly feeling, or complete loss of sensation in a body part

definition_cn: 比喻反应迟钝，思想不敏锐。

origin_definition_en: put sb. to trouble; trouble sb.; bother

origin_definition_cn: 神经系统的病变引起的身体某一部分知觉能力的丧失和运动机能的障碍。
definition_cn: 神经系统病变导致的身体部分感觉或运动障碍。
origin_definition_en: paralysis; loss or impairment of sensation or function in certain part of the human body, caused by disease of the nerves

origin_definition_cn: 用药物或针刺等方法使整个有机体或有机体的某一部分暂时失去知觉,多在施行外科手术时采用,分为全身麻醉、局部麻醉和脊髓麻醉三种。
definition_cn: 通过药物或针刺使身体暂时失去知觉，用于外科手术。
origin_definition_en: anaesthesia; use of medication or acupuncture to induce temporary insensitivity to pain to facilitate surgery, in three categories:general, local, and spinal anaesthesia

origin_definition_cn: 用某种手段使人认识模糊、意志消沉。
definition_cn: 比喻使人意志消沉或认识模糊。
origin_definition_en: corrupt; poison sb's mind (by a certain means)

origin_definition_cn: 像丝瓜花或向日葵花的颜色。
origin_definition_en: yellow, like the flowers of towel gourd or sunflower

origin_definition_cn: 象征腐化堕落,特指色情
(Huáng)指黄帝,中国古代传说中的帝王
definition_cn: 黄帝，中国古代传说中的帝王。

origin_definition_cn: 事情失败或计划不能实现
origin_definition_en: fail; fizzle out; come to nothing; fall through

origin_definition_cn: 日落以后天黑以前的时候。
definition_cn: 日落之后天黑之前的时段。

origin_definition_cn: 落叶乔木,树皮淡灰色,羽状复叶,小叶卵形或卵状披针形,开黄绿色小花,果实黑色。木材坚硬,可以制造枪托,茎可以制黄色染料。树皮可入药。
definition_cn: 落叶乔木，树皮可入药，木材坚硬。
origin_definition_en: Amur cork tree (Phell-odendron amurense); deciduous tree having light grey bark, pinnately compound oval leaves that are either leaflets or lanceolate, small, yellow and green flowers, and black fruit, its timber useful for making gunstock, its stems for making yellow dyestuff, and its bark for medicine;

origin_definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,茎蔓生,有卷须,叶子互生,花黄色。果实圆柱形,通常有刺,成熟时黄绿色,是普通蔬菜。
definition_cn: 一年生草本植物，果实为常见蔬菜。
origin_definition_en: cucumber (Cucumis sativus); annual grass plant, having a trailing stem, tendrils, alternate leaves, yellow flowers, and thorny cylindrical fruit, turning yellowish green when mature, used as a common vegetable

origin_definition_cn: 病人的皮肤、黏膜和眼球的巩膜发黄的症状,由血液中胆红素增高而引起。某些肝炎有这种症状。
definition_cn: 皮肤、黏膜等发黄的病症，由胆红素增高引起。
origin_definition_en: jaundice; symptom where the patient's skin, the mucosa and sclera of the eyes turn yellow, resulting from the rise of bilirubin in the blood, oft. seen in cases of hepatitis;

origin_definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,羽状复叶,小叶长圆形,有毛茸,开淡黄色小花。根可入药。
definition_cn: 多年生草本植物，根可入药。
origin_definition_en: milk vetch (Astragalus membranaceus); herbaceous perennial plant having pinnately compound leaves, long, round and hairy leaflets, small, light yellow flowers, and root used for medicine

origin_definition_cn: 一种黄毛夹杂着白点子的马。
origin_definition_en: horse having a yellow coat with white spots

origin_definition_cn: 鸟,身体黄色,自眼部至头后部黑色,嘴淡红色。叫的声音很好听,吃森林中的害虫,对林业有益。
origin_definition_en: oriole (Oriolidae); songbird with a yellow body, black from eyes to the back of the head, and a pale red mouth, eating pests in forests, beneficial to forestry;

origin_definition_cn: 天快要亮或刚亮的时候
像糨糊或胶水等所具有的、能使一个物体附着在另一物体上的性质
像煤或墨的颜色,是物体完全吸收日光或与日光相似的光线时所呈现的颜色(跟‘白’相对as opposed to‘white’})
origin_definition_en: black; the colour of coal or pitch, or sth. that absorbs all sunlight or sunlight-like rays

definition_cn: 颜色像煤或墨的，与“白”相对
秘密的；非法的；不正当的

origin_definition_cn: 用木头或玻璃等制成的可以在上面用粉笔写字的黑色平板。
definition_cn: 用于书写的黑色平板，通常由木头或玻璃制成
origin_definition_en: blackboard; large, smooth and dark board of wood, glass or other materials on which to write or draw with chalk

origin_definition_cn: 青黑色的颜料,古代女子用来画眉
definition_cn: 古代女子画眉用的青黑色颜料
origin_definition_en: black pigment, used by women in ancient times to paint their eyebrows

origin_definition_cn: 礼服上绣的半青半黑的花纹。
definition_cn: 古代礼服上青黑相间的花纹
origin_definition_en: half-blue, half-black patterns embroidered on ceremonial gowns

origin_definition_cn: 煮东西用的器物,三足两耳。
definition_cn: 古代三足两耳的烹煮器具
origin_definition_en: tripod cauldron for cooking, with three legs and two ears
enter upon a period of; when

origin_definition_cn: 使某些乐器或东西发出声音;敲
origin_definition_en: produce sound by some instruments or things; beat

origin_definition_cn: 用语言、文字等激发人们的情绪,使他们行动起来
origin_definition_en: gird sb. into action with rhetorics; agitate; arouse

origin_definition_cn: 拍手,多表示高兴、赞成或欢迎
origin_definition_en: clap one's hands to express joy, approval or welcome; applaud

origin_definition_cn: 使振作起来,增强信心或勇气

origin_definition_en: small drum used in the army

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物的一科,种类很多,一般的身体小,尾巴长,门齿很发达,没有犬齿,毛褐色或黑色,繁殖力很强,有的能传播鼠疫。通称老鼠,有的地区叫耗子。
definition_cn: 啮齿类哺乳动物的统称
origin_definition_en: mouse; rat; any of numerous mammals of the family Muridae, with a small body, elongated tail, brown or black hair, and well-developed fore teeth but no canine teeth, and having a strong reproductive capacity, some varieties acting as vectors of plague; generally known as 老鼠lǎoshǔ; also called 耗子hào zi in some regions

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物的一科,身体细长,四肢短小,尾较粗,唇有须,毛有黄褐、棕、灰棕等色。如黄鼬、紫貂。
origin_definition_en: weasel (Mustela nivalis); mammal with a long, slender body, short legs, a bushy tail, moustache about the mouth, and tawny, brown or greyish brown hair, such as yellow weasel and sable

origin_definition_cn: 哺乳动物,毛黑褐色,嘴尖,眼小。前肢发达,脚掌向外翻,有利爪,适于掘土,后肢细小。白天住在土中,夜晚出来捕食昆虫,也吃农作物的根。
origin_definition_en: mole (Talpa europaea); small burrowing insectivorous mammal of the family Talpidae, usu. living underground during the daytime and coming out to feed on insects and the roots of farm crops at night, having dark brown fur, pointed muzzle, small rudimentary eyes, and strong forefeet with soles turned outward for burrowing;

origin_definition_cn: 人和高等动物的嗅觉器官,又是呼吸器官的一部分,位于头部,有两个孔。
origin_definition_en: nose; olfactory organ with two holes on the face of humans and higher animals; part of respiratory organs

origin_definition_cn: 鼻腔黏膜所分泌的液体。
origin_definition_en: nasal mucus; snivel; liquid secreted by the mucous membrane of nasal cavity
snore; deep and noisy breathing while asleep

definition_cn: 调味品；用于调味的材料

origin_definition_en: now oft. pronounced qí in this meaning
definition_en: alloy (now usually pronounced qí in this meaning)

origin_definition_cn: 跟某一点或某一直线取齐
definition_cn: 对齐；使与某点或直线平齐

origin_definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今山东北部和河北东南部。
definition_cn: 周朝诸侯国名，位于今山东北部和河北东南部
origin_definition_en: Qi, name of a state during the Zhou Dynasty, in present-day north Shandong and southeast Hebei provinces
definition_en: Qi, a Zhou Dynasty state in north Shandong and southeast Hebei

origin_definition_cn: 唐末农民起义军领袖黄巢所建国号。
definition_cn: 唐末黄巢起义建立的国号
origin_definition_en: Qi, reign title of a kingdom founded by Huang Chao, a peasant uprising leader towards the end of the Tang Dynasty
definition_en: Qi, Huang Chao's rebel kingdom in late Tang

definition_cn: 完备无缺；应有尽有（多指物品）
同心协力；团结一致地努力

origin_definition_cn: 人类和高等动物咀嚼食物的器官,由坚固的骨组织和釉质构成,每个齿分三部分。下部细长成锥形,叫齿根,上部叫齿冠,齿根和齿冠之间叫齿颈。按部位和形状的不同,分为门齿、犬齿、前臼齿和臼齿。通称牙或牙齿。
definition_cn: 人类和高等动物用于咀嚼的器官，通称牙齿
origin_definition_en: tooth; organ of humans and advanced animals used to masticate food, commonly known as 牙yá or 牙齿yáchǐ and composed of solid bone tissue and enamel. Each tooth comprises three parts:the thin, conical root, the upper crown, and the middle neck. A set of teeth consists of incisors, canines, premolars and molars, according to their location and shape.
stand side by side; stand shoulder to shoulder; of the same kind
upper and lower teeth not meeting properly;

origin_definition_cn: 上下牙齿不齐；比喻意见不合
definition_cn: 牙齿不齐；比喻意见不合

origin_definition_en: duration; length of time or service

origin_definition_cn: 某些生物体发育过程中不同的阶段。如昆虫的幼虫第一次蜕皮前叫一龄虫;水稻长到七个叶叫七叶龄。
definition_cn: 生物发育的不同阶段（如昆虫龄期、水稻叶龄）
origin_definition_en: instar; stadium; various stages of the development process of some organisms, e.g. the larva of an insect before its first exuviation is called the first-instar insect; and the rice after having leafed seven times is called seventh instar rice

origin_definition_cn: 形容气量狭小,拘于小节。
中国古代传说中的神异动物,身体长,有鳞,有角,有脚,能走,能飞,能游泳,能兴云降雨。
definition_cn: 中国古代传说中的神异动物，能兴云降雨
origin_definition_en: dragon; mythological animal with a long body, scales, horns, wings and feet, which could walk, fly, swim and gather clouds to pour down rain

origin_definition_cn: 封建时代用龙作为帝王的象征,也把龙字用在帝王使用的东西上
origin_definition_en: The dragon was a symbol of the emperor in feudal China. The character was also affixed to things used by the emperor

origin_definition_cn: 形状像龙的或装有龙的图案的
origin_definition_en: shaped like a dragon; with the design of a dragon

origin_definition_cn: 古生物学上指古代某些爬行动物,如恐龙、翼手龙等。
definition_cn: 古生物学指某些古代爬行动物（如恐龙）
origin_definition_en: (of palaeontology) ancient reptiles such as dinosaur, pterodactyl, etc.

origin_definition_cn: 裂开许多缝子;呈现出许多裂纹
origin_definition_en: (of land) split with many cracks; (of skin) chap

origin_definition_cn: 龟兹(Qiūcí),古代西域国名,在今新疆库车一带。
definition_cn: 古代西域龟兹国（在今新疆库车）
origin_definition_en: Qiuci, ancient kingdom in the Western Region, in present-day Kuqa, the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region

origin_definition_cn: 爬行动物的一科,身体长圆而扁,背部隆起,有坚硬的壳,四肢短,趾有蹼,头、尾巴和四肢都能缩入甲壳内。多生活在水边,吃植物或小动物。常见的有乌龟。
definition_cn: 龟鳖目爬行动物的统称
origin_definition_en: tortoise, of the family Testudinidae; turtle; terrapin; chelonian; family of reptiles having round flat bodies curved on the backs and hard shells, short limbs and webbed feet, capable of withdrawing their heads, limbs and tails into their carapace, and living near water, feeding on plants or small animals. The Chinemys reevesii is the most commonly seen member of the family.
